name: Level Devil - NOT A Troll Game

detail.description:
BIG, BEAUTIFUL UPDATE
- ~200 levels that will make you cry literal tears of joy
- Updated graphics so intense your apple phone will esplode
- Gameplay even more relaxing and safe for all
- Added soft and cozy bullets and bombs alongside the adorable buzzsaws
- 
- A real ending for all the delicate flowers that cried in their pillows about the original ending.
- Now you can speed run by pushing the speed run button
detail.releaseNotes: Made Part 3 slightly more survivable. Emphasis on slightly.

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
inferredReasons.detail: 未能自動推測原因，建議手動查看
